code_value: Good morning, everyone. This term, our class is working on environmental protection. I found lots of plastic waste in our school yard, and neighbours throw tons of rubbish every week. So we take clear steps: First, we reduce the use of plastic bags and bottles. Second, we reuse old books and boxes as long as possible. Finally, we divide our rubbish into plastic, paper and glass to recycle. Our teacher praised our efforts, and more neighbours are joining us now. We know we can't make rapid change, but every small step counts. Let's keep acting for our clean future!

你将听到一段Mary关于环保主题演讲的短文，录音播放两遍。请根据所听到的内容，选择思维导图中正确的信息（二选一），在50秒钟内转述她的演讲（包含四个要点的内容）。
